text:
Wake up besties, new texture pack just dropped 🌿✨ The hive has been BIZZ-y (sorry had to) cooking up some sweet updates for your creative toolkit. 

Here’s what’s blooming in the garden:
🎶 Audio Suite is POPPING off: We got music generation, speech-to-text transcription, and v3 speech. Your ears are gonna love this.
🎨 Fresh Paint: The Dashboard and Play page got a cozy glow-up. It’s giving clean, it’s giving aesthetic.
🤖 Polly is Free: Our discord bot code is now open source! Go fork it, break it, build it.
⚡ Speed Run: Optimized search and stable diffusion models = less waiting, more creating.

No gatekeeping, just good vibes and better tools. Go touch some digital grass. 🌱

Link in bio to try the new toys! 🔗
